summary: Results-driven Technical Program Manager with 16+ years of experience leading large-scale platform initiatives, driving AI-powered automation programs, and delivering measurable outcomes including cost savings, incident automation, and engineering toil elimination, seeking a self-motivated Senior Site Reliability Engineer role at Docusign.

experience.role: Technical Program Manager / SRE Program Lead
details: Drove end-to-end evaluation, deployment, and rollout of Azure SRE Agent platform for Xbox PSE
Coordinated with engineering teams to integrate ICM, App Insights, Log Analytics, and Azure DevOps
Delivered 30-35% incident automation potential across 20+ incident categories
Projected 150+ hours/year of SRE toil elimination through automated diagnostics
Defined RBAC via PIM (S360-compliant) and cross-tenant access architecture
Managed end-to-end program lifecycle for Azure Live Site Operations with 99.9%+ availability SLA
Built and scaled 24x7 global operations organization across multiple geographies
Led disaster recovery coordination and compliance initiatives
Drove digital transformation replacing legacy operations with cloud-native workflows
Managed server infrastructure operations including builds, migrations, patching, and clustering
